ink.description: Inkle's ink scripting language support for Visual Studio Code
ink.configuration.title: Ink Extension Settings
ink.engine.description: Select the engine used for developing the Ink project.
ink.markup.description: Select the markup format for the project. Default is none.
ink.mainFile.description: Path to the main .ink file (e.g. main.ink). If empty, no main file is defined.
ink.rootFolder.description: Root folder containing .ink files to be loaded. If empty, no root folder is defined.
ink.port.description: Port used by the engine for localhost connections.
ink.preview.title: Preview of the current file
ink.runProject.title: Run the ink project
